---
title: '4 Indicators Of Wrong Soul Ties'
date: '2019-06-08T08:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1004359890327427360'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/4-indicators-of-wrong-soul-ties.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://www.terri.com/4-indicators-of-wrong-soul-ties/">https://www.terri.com/4-indicators-of-wrong-soul-ties/</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>4 Indicators Of Wrong Soul Ties<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://www.terri.com/4-indicators-of-wrong-soul-ties/"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-786872-fdf391e5a3e6.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700054010807959090" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-786872-c6210cfb8c1c.jpg" /></a>&lt;img   width="980" height="360" src="/images/imported/www-terri-com/4indicatorsofwrongsoulties-840ff65acf7b.jpg" class="attachment-large size-large wp-post-image" alt="" srcset="/images/imported/www-terri-com/4indicatorsofwrongsoulties-840ff65acf7b.jpg   980w, /images/imported/www-terri-com/4indicatorsofwrongsoulties-300x110-f5161ce3c150.jpg 300w" sizes="(max-width: 980px) 100vw, 980px" /&gt;<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>01<br />  Jul<o:p></o:p></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Out of the hundreds of video podcasts Iâ€™ve recorded, my highest viewed videos on YouTube are on â€œBreaking Soul Tiesâ€. I receive countless emails,&nbsp;letters and messages from women and men with questions about this intimate topic. They are   in wrong relationships, admit that itâ€™s wrong, but cannot seem to move on. Teenagers have crossed the line with various partners and donâ€™t know how to make things right. Old flames have re-kindled an inappropriate secret romance. They grieve in their soul   when that person rejects them, moves on to someone else, or God clearly instructs them to end things. To put it mildly, soul ties are powerful.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
What are soul ties?<br />  A soul tie is an emotional bond or connection that unites you with someone else. You can become bound to a person through your soul.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Have you found yourself tormented by thoughts about a person, excessively wondering about them, checking on them, rehearsing times with them? If so, you have soul ties. Have you grieved over a severed relationship with someone you were   once close to? If so, you have soul ties.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Soul ties are formed through close friendships, through vows, commitments and promises, and through physical intimacy. Not all soul ties are bad. God wants us to have healthy relationships that build us up, provide wisdom, and give godly   counsel. God will strategically bring good relationships into our lives to form healthy soul ties. â€œWhen David had finished speaking to Saul, the soul of Jonathan was knit with the soul of David, and Jonathan loved him as his own lifeâ€ (1 Sam. 18:1 (AMP).   In contrast, Satan always brings counterfeits into our lives to form unhealthy soul ties.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
A few ways unhealthy soul ties can be formed include:<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Â· Abusive relationships (physically, sexually, emotionally, verbally)<br />  Â· Adulterous affairs<br />  Â· Sex before marriage<br />  Â· Obsessive entanglements with a person (giving them more authority in your life than you give to God)<br />  Â· Controlling relationships<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Four Indicators of Wrong Soul Ties<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
1. â€œI feel so confused.â€<br />  When you are outside the will of God in a particular relationship, you will experience confusion. Your feelings will tell you one thing; your spirit will tell you another. Thatâ€™s where the confusion comes in. â€œGod is not the author of confusion but of peaceâ€   (1 Cor. 14:33, KJV). If you are not experiencing peace in this relationship or â€œsoul tieâ€, then something is not right. That is the Holy Spirit warning you and working to get your attention. You need to respect these warnings. They are not to be brushed off   or treated as a small thing. Honor the Holy Spiritâ€™s leading in your life. You should not feel confused if you are in the will of God, and honestly, why would you want to be any other place? When you are confused about a relationship, you can make unwise,   regretful decisions. You need to take purposeful steps in feeding your spirit the truth of Godâ€™s Word. The truth always overrides deception.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
2. â€œIâ€™m just miserable.â€<br />  When we persist in doing something that we know God is not in agreement with, we will experience a type of misery that doesnâ€™t go away. You may feel uneasy inside, extreme anxiety, sorrow or pain. You may feel disgusted by what youâ€™re doing, yet feel powerless   to change your situation. Those are all indicators that Satan is at work in your life to destroy it. David cried out in Psalm 38:8, â€œI am exhausted and completely crushed. My groans come from an anguished heart.â€ (NLT). If that describes how you feel when   youâ€™re alone, I want you to know there is hope. Psalm 23:3 says, â€œHe restores my soulâ€ (NIV). Those four little words will redefine your life. God will restore your mind, your will and your emotions.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
3. â€œMy mind is tormented.â€<br />  The mind of Christ is one that is at peace no matter what the circumstances. When Satan has invaded our souls through wrong soul ties, our minds will not be at rest. This is where your battle takes place. Is your mind constantly replaying images of the past   and rehearsing previous conversations like a broken record? Do your thoughts produce fear or make you feel unclean? Whatever is going on in your mind is affecting your emotional state. Your feelings are indicators of what you are thinking about. Second Corinthians   10:5 says that we are to renew our minds by taking â€œcaptive every thought to make it obedient to Christâ€ (NIV). I will be the first to admit that this is not easy, but it is necessary. You can do this. As a Christian you can get your thoughts under the control   of your reborn spirit. How? By speaking Godâ€™s Word out of your mouth every single time a negative thought enters your mind. Donâ€™t just think it, speak it. It can be as simple as saying: â€œThank You, Lord, that you restore my soulâ€â€¦ over and over and over. Be   persistent. Thereâ€™s nothing Satan hates more than to hear you speak the Word of God and the name of Jesus out of your mouth!<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
4. â€œI didnâ€™t mean to disobey Godâ€¦on purpose.â€<br />  If you feel like you have been dealing with a situation for far too long and nothing seems to help you get beyond it, remember this phrase: God will not advance your instructions beyond your last act of disobedience. If you donâ€™t fully obey what God is telling   you to do, you will never move beyond your current circumstances. I donâ€™t know what that means to you, but I know what it meant for me years ago. I was desperate to move beyond my circumstances no matter how painful it would be.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Why would we disobey God?<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Â· We doubt our ability to hear from God.<br />  Â· It hurts too badly.<br />  Â· Itâ€™s uncomfortable.<br />  Â· Itâ€™s not what our flesh â€œwantsâ€ to do.<br />  Â· We say that we are waiting for God to change us.<br />  Â· We are waiting for God to change someone else.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Rather than simply obey God, I believe we try to find answers that wonâ€™t be uncomfortable. We wait for an easier way, but we stay miserable inside. What is God telling you to do? Be honest with yourself right now. If God was standing in   front of you right now, what do you believe He would instruct you to do in your situation? Donâ€™t go another day, month, or year strugglingâ€”obey Godâ€™s instructions. Remember, partial obedience is still disobedience. Delayed obedience is still disobedience.   Do what God is telling you to do knowing ahead of time that itâ€™s always for your benefit. God is not trying to hurt you. Heâ€™s trying to help you. He sees what you donâ€™t see. You will never regret obeying God. Never. Your life isnâ€™t over because a relationship   is. God wants you to let go of the past and get on a pursuit. He has big dreams for your life.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
For&nbsp;further teaching on this topic:<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLA9DC06B38B9BC83A" target="_blank">http://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLA9DC06B38B9BC83A</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://terri.com/store/products/64-untangle.aspx">https://terri.com/store/products/64-untangle.aspx</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Triage Associate | Account Protection  <o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Alliance Data  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">751 W Hanley, Coeur dâ€™Alene, ID 83815<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.knowmoresellmore.com/"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">knowmoresellmore.com</span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">   | </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2973795?trk=tyah"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">LinkedIn  </span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/KnowMoreSellMore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Facebook</span></a><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://twitter.com/know_sellmore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Twitter</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
<br clear="both" />
______________________________________________________________________<br />
The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<br />
______________________________________________________________________
